title: Count Leaves
description: Given a binary tree (parent array), count the number of leaves (nodes with no children).
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: parent array (−1 = root).

botCodes.code:
n=int(input())
p=list(map(int,input().split()))
has_child=[False]*n
for i,par in enumerate(p):
    if par>=0:has_child[par]=True
print(sum(1 for i in range(n) if not has_child[i]))

#include<stdio.h>
int main(){int n;scanf("%d",&n);int hc[100001]={0};for(int i=0;i<n;i++){int p;scanf("%d",&p);if(p>=0)hc[p]=1;}int c=0;for(int i=0;i<n;i++)c+=!hc[i];printf("%d\n",c);}

let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let p=Array.init n(fun _->Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) in let hc=Array.make n false in Array.iter(fun x->if x>=0 then hc.(x)<-true)p;Printf.printf"%d\n"(Array.fold_left(fun a x->if not x then a+1 else a)0 hc)
